metrics.killSwitchDescription: Manual halt arms at this DD

recentReports.title: Recent reports
recentReports.description: Sign-offs, sweeps, and reviews from docs/test-reports/.
recentReports.emptyPrefix: No recent reports surfaced. Drop sign-off markdown files under

actionItems.title: Action items
actionItems.description: Things the workbench wants you to look at.
actionItems.empty: Nothing flagged. Action items light up when a strategy gate trips or a wash-sale heuristic fires (B022 F010).

list.title: Sleeves
list.deeplinkHint: Append <param>?selected=B013-regime-quarterly</param> to deep-link a detail panel.

details.selectHint: Select a sleeve from the list above to see config + provenance + charts.

equity.title: Equity curve
equity.description: Populated by the F008 backtest runner — wraps the F004 EquityCurveChart.

drawdown.title: Drawdown
drawdown.description: Shares the time axis with the equity curve (F008).

heatmap.title: Turnover heatmap
heatmap.description: Cells appear when sweep data lands (F008/F009 wire real values).

selector.title: Selector
selector.description: Pick a strategy + snapshot + window, then Run.

metrics.title: Headline metrics
metrics.description: Synthetic engine in F008 — real numbers land in B023.

equity.title: Equity curve
equity.description: Master vs benchmarks; pan/zoom syncs the drawdown chart below.

card.title: Sign-offs, sweeps, reviews
card.descriptionSuffix: . Click a title to render the markdown with sortable AG Grid for any table with 10+ rows.

detail.bodyDescription: Markdown + GFM tables; heavy tables (≥10 rows) render as sortable AG Grid.
detail.crossLinksDescriptionPrefix: Repo paths referenced by this report.

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.disclaimerBody: This page produces a manual review checklist; the workbench never places orders. Export the markdown ticket and execute manually after independent review.

emptyAccount.title: No account on file
emptyAccount.descriptionSuffix: with cash + equity to surface target positions. Until then, gate checks render but positions stay empty.

deltas.title: Rebalance deltas
deltas.description: Target − current per sleeve (sign = buy/sell direction).

gates.title: Gate checks
gates.description: Pre-trade safety filters. All must pass before manual execution.

wash.title: Wash-sale flags
wash.description: 30-day same-symbol buy heuristic from the trade journal.

exportCard.title: Export markdown ticket
exportCard.descriptionSuffix: . The exported file carries the same research-only disclaimer pinned in

table.title: Public snapshot inventory
table.descriptionPrefix: Rows mirror the SnapshotMeta table; Refresh streams a synthetic 5-stage progress modal until the real

modal.title: Refreshing snapshot…
modal.description: Stages stream via SSE; the modal stays open until you close it.

toast.incomplete: Refresh ended without a complete event

table.title: Entries
table.descriptionSuffix: so the durable record on disk stays in lockstep with the workbench's run-time view.

headlines.yellow: Risk: per-sleeve drawdown over advisory threshold

positionDiff.title: Position diff
positionDiff.description: Current account state vs target portfolio. Workbench is research-only; review and process manually in your broker.
positionDiff.emptyDescriptionSuffix: page to seed a baseline snapshot. The diff renders once cash + positions are recorded.
positionDiff.currentAllocationDescription: $ per symbol from the latest snapshot.
positionDiff.targetAllocationDescription: $ per symbol if rebalanced to target weights.
positionDiff.perSymbolDescription: Positive Δ = buy, negative Δ = sell. Reference price = position cost basis; target-only symbols are flagged below.
positionDiff.unmatchedDescription: Target symbols with no current position to anchor a price reference. Share calculations for these rows fall back to the cash basis until the symbol has a cost-basis record.
positionDiff.unmatchedEmpty: None — every target symbol has a price reference.
positionDiff.unmatchedLabel: target weight {weight}% — no cost basis on file

ticket.title: Order ticket
ticket.description: Generate a Markdown rebalance checklist. The workbench is research-only — review and process manually in your broker app.
ticket.modeCardDescription: The kill-switch tripped. The defensive ticket rotates fully into the B011 defensive sleeve; the normal ticket follows the current target portfolio.
ticket.previewCardDescriptionPrefix: The body the workbench wrote to
ticket.historyCardDescription: Newest first. Click a row to view the read-only ticket.
ticket.historyEmpty: No tickets yet. Generate one above to seed the history.

ticketDetail.descriptionSuffix: to generate a new ticket from the current diff.
ticketDetail.checklistDescription: Research-only. The workbench did not place these orders.

fills.title: Fill journal
fills.description: Upload broker CSV or enter fills manually. The workbench records what you processed; it does not place orders.
fills.ticketCardDescription: Pick the ticket these fills belong to. Voided / executed tickets are read-only.
fills.csvCardDescription: Generic / Schwab / IBKR formats auto-detected. Errors return per-row; the rest of the file is preserved for re-upload.
fills.manualCardDescription: One row per fill. Validated client-side first.
fills.rowErrorsCardDescription: Fix the listed rows and resubmit. The other rows are preserved.
fills.historyCardDescription: Persisted journal rows. Reconcile in the journal-history view (F005).
fills.historyEmpty: No fills recorded for this ticket yet.

journalHistory.title: Journal history
journalHistory.description: Past tickets, fills, and slippage analytics. Workbench is research-only.
journalHistory.trendCardDescription: Per-month avg bps over the selected rolling window.
journalHistory.trendEmpty: No processed tickets in the {window} window.
journalHistory.tableCardDescription: Sortable, filterable. Click a ticket id to open the read-only viewer.
journalHistory.tableEmptyPrefix: No tickets recorded yet. Generate one in

account.title: Account state
account.description: Edit cash + positions. Every save inserts a new snapshot (source = ui_edit) — old snapshots stay on file for reconciliation history.
account.cashCardDescription: Settled cash in the base currency.
account.positionsCardDescription: One row per held symbol; shares × avg cost contributes to equity.

login.title: Workbench sign-in
login.description: Google sign-in is the only entry point. Account creation is intentionally absent — the workbench is single-user by design.
login.restrictedNotice: This workbench is restricted to a single authorized user.

errorPage.notFoundDescription: This page does not exist or has moved. Head back to the workbench home to continue.
errorPage.errorDescription: The page failed to render. Click retry, or return to the home page. Keep the error id so the team can investigate.

validation.weightsExceedEquity: Positions notional exceeds total equity — weights must be ≤ 1.0.
validation.formHasErrors: Form has errors — fix them before saving.

toast.addAtLeastOneFill: Add at least one fill row.
